business_description.nature_of_business: Hospitality — Hotel and Restaurant operations across multiple Texas locations including full-service hotels, boutique inns, and food & beverage establishments

coverages_discussed.notes: 8 locations across Austin, San Antonio, and Fredericksburg TX; Total Insured Value $168,230,000 comprising Building ($101,570,000), Contents ($25,150,000), and BI ($40,510,000). All locations sprinklered. Varied construction classes including Fire Resistive, Masonry Non-Combustible, Non-Combustible, and Joisted Masonry. 2 property claims: $178,566 paid / $215,927 incurred.
8 GL claims; $8,780 paid / $82,656 incurred. Restaurant and hotel occupancies present slip/fall and liquor liability exposure.
28 WC claims; $324,545 paid / $415,934 incurred. Hospitality workforce across hotels and restaurants. EMPLOYERS Insurance Group was prior WC carrier in 2020.

positives: Majority of TIV ($154,070,000 of $168,230,000) is in Fire Resistive or Masonry Non-Combustible construction
Strong balance sheet: Total Assets $77,004,300 with Equity of $52,535,400 (~68% equity ratio)
Profitable operations with Net Income of $3,220,600 on $42,000,000 revenue
Geographic concentration in Texas reduces multi-state regulatory complexity
Properties span a range of vintage years (1998–2015) with no extremely aged stock
Modern roof types across portfolio (TPO, Metal, EPDM, Concrete, Built-Up)
Total GL paid losses are low ($8,780) relative to claim count
concerns: Claim count spiked to 11 in 2024 (from 3 in 2023), indicating potential adverse frequency trend
Workers Compensation loss history is significant: 28 claims with $415,934 total incurred
Joisted Masonry construction at LOC-007 (Mission Cantina - Pearl District) represents highest fire risk construction class in portfolio
Five different carriers in five years signals potential market difficulty or unfavorable loss history
LOC-002 Riverwalk Suites San Antonio carries the largest single-location TIV at $64,610,000 (38% of portfolio TIV), representing concentration risk
Corporate Headquarters (LOC-008) has zero building value, suggesting a leased premises with tenant improvements not captured or underreported values
GL incurred ($82,656) is nearly 10x paid ($8,780), suggesting open/developing claims reserves
WC incurred ($415,934) vs. paid ($324,545) gap of ~$91,389 indicates open WC reserves
Drivers sheet contains no data — auto/fleet exposure is undocumented
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Five-year loss history across three coverages: Workers Compensation is the most significant line with 28 claims, $324,545 paid and $415,934 incurred. General Liability shows 8 claims with $8,780 paid and $82,656 incurred (large development ratio). Property has 2 claims with $178,566 paid and $215,927 incurred. Annual premium trend has increased from $580,805 (2020) to $686,236 (2024), a 18.2% five-year increase. Carrier changes occurred every year from 2020–2024: EMPLOYERS (2020), Chubb (2021), Zurich (2022), Markel (2023), Travelers (2024).

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Hill Country Hospitality Partners, LLC operates a portfolio of 8 commercial properties across Texas, consisting of 4 hotels (The Driskill Austin, Riverwalk Suites San Antonio, Fredericksburg Inn & Spa, South Congress Motor Hotel), 3 restaurants (Blanco River Steakhouse, The Oasis at Lake Travis, Mission Cantina - Pearl District), and a corporate headquarters office. Total square footage across the portfolio is approximately 390,500 SF. Properties are located in Austin, San Antonio, and Fredericksburg, TX. The entity structure includes a Named Insured (Hill Country Hospitality Partners, LLC) with 8 related entities in roles including General Partner, Property Owner, Managing Member, Additional Named Insured, Joint Venture Partner, and Affiliate.
